summary: 2018 DHS x NFL 'See Something, Say Something' public-service announcement: an NFL referee in a locker room delivers a spoken testimonial drawing an analogy between officiating and watching the stands, urging fans to report suspicious activity, closing on NFL and DHS logos and 'We care about the safety of our fans.' Spoken-word testimonial PSA, not music-driven, and a conventional safety spot. Out of scope: a plain informational PSA, not youth-appeal music-driven genre content.
notable_text: You play an important role in keeping our communities safe.; If you see something suspicious...; Report suspicious activity to local law enforcement.; WE CARE ABOUT THE SAFETY OF OUR FANS.
